rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §254.162 governs campaign committee status notifications. The two provisions are unrelated and do not conflict.
quote: If a general-purpose committee changes its operation and becomes a specific-purpose committee, notice of the change in status shall be given to the commission as provided by Section 254.129 for a specific-purpose committee.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is from Election Code campaign finance provisions, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
